creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
I just committed this along with 2.9.0, and completely forgot to credit y'all's in the commit message.

I did have to change the patch slightly: as written, it would have affected the versioning of caddy-custom, leading to caddy-custom not getting bumped when caddy's PORTREVISION changes.

Thank you all for your work on this, and for your extreme patience in it getting into the tree! I'm leaving this ticket open in case I broke anything. Please LMK whether it looks right and behaves correctly now.
